rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers
Register match — Bootstrap voice trio
rules_evaluated.evidence: 3:What you do: / 5:Richard Rumelt calls it the **crux** / 7-9:Setup and pushback instruction

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5:crux introduced operationally / 14-21: obstacle, load-bearing inside prompt context

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Punchy framing keeps its punch
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs
Watch out for planting jargon too early
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5:crux introduced operationally on first use / plain operational vocabulary throughout

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No combative verbs about the agent in body prose
Aspirational destination, never corrective gap
rules_evaluated.evidence: 3:What you do: / 9:Ask Claude to read the memory and name the crux

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5:crux earned with Rumelt credit and definition

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Business-audience word ban (Bootstrap default)
Student moves stay in conversation with the agent
rules_evaluated.evidence: All student actions (read, name, iterate) occur inside fenced prompts

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No em-dashes. Simple sentences
Section headers use command verbs when the section is about doing something
No placeholders inside fenced blocks
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in
rules_evaluated.evidence: 11:Ask Claude to read the memory and name the crux. / 30:Ask Claude to name the sharpest decision...

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block
rules_evaluated.evidence: Both blocks have lead-in, **Prompt** label with *(Claude Code)* chip, fenced content

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chain prompts by back-reference and deterministic path
rules_evaluated.evidence: 34:Open ./crux.md and read the crux you just saved

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chained-prompt isolation — don't leak the downstream pipeline
rules_evaluated.evidence: Block 1 produces crux independently; Block 2 opens prior file without leaking what comes next

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Prompt-chain context preservation — no session-resets mid-phase
Markdown shout inside fenced prompt blocks is dead weight in Claude Code
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 14-21, 34-36: backticks for code/paths, bullets, no markdown shout

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Grill before save — collaborative quality at artefact assembly
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 21, 36: 'show me before saving' instances of rule 20 carve-out for finalization

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths, never naked filenames (Bootstrap-specific) — Special carve-out: deliberate root saves use ./ prefix
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 21 and 36 correctly use ./crux.md with ./ prefix per documented carve-out for deliberate root saves
